name: stackra/billing-sdk
purpose: Typed Saloon SDK for the Billing service — subscriptions, plans, invoices, licenses, usage, entitlements. Umbrella client built on stackra/api-sdk.
when_to_use: A consumer service that needs to check or mutate billing state (entitlements, subscription tier) cross-service.
when_not_to_use: For in-process gate checks inside the billing service, use the local EntitlementGate directly.
